headline: Healthpeak Properties and Brookfield Form a $2.1 Billion Strategic Joint Venture
summary: DENVER & NEW YORK, July 20, 2026--Healthpeak Properties, Inc. (NYSE: DOC) ("Healthpeak") and Brookfield Asset Management (NYSE: BAM, TSX: BAM) ("Brookfield"), today announced the formation of a long-term strategic capital partnership through a joint venture involving a portfolio of outpatient medical buildings across the United States.
